# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.

road_building = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	icon = road_building
	research_cost = 2.0
	has_road_building = yes
	
	unlock_road_type = gravel_road

	requires = city_building_advance
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}

paved_road_advance = {
	age = age_3_discovery
	unlock_road_type = paved_road
	requires = crown_power_advance_discovery

	ai_weight = { add = 100 }
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}



modern_road_advance = {
	age = age_5_absolutism
	unlock_road_type = modern_road
	requires = scientific_mapping_advance

	ai_weight = { add = 100 }
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}


railroad_advance = {
	age = age_6_revolutions
	unlock_road_type = railroad
	requires = steel_mill_advance

	ai_weight = { add = 100 }
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}
